message:
Apply clippy and idiomatic Rust fixes across server, storage, and tools crates

- cleanup.rs: Flatten nested if-let for git ls-files check
- mail_ui.rs: Replace match-with-Err propagation with ? operator
- startup_checks.rs: Flatten nested if-let for fd limit parse,
  fix bare URL in doc comment to use angle brackets
- tui_app.rs: Add clippy::too_many_lines allow for housekeeping tick
- tui_poller.rs: Simplify Option chain with .map(), inline lock
  guard into wait_timeout, change fetch_db_stats return from
  Option<DbStatSnapshot> to DbStatSnapshot (always returns a value),
  flatten nested if condition
- storage/lib.rs: Use is_none_or instead of !is_some_and for lock
  extension check
- messaging.rs: Replace match-with-None with unwrap_or for inbox limit

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
